Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student user of the Dial A Tutor application, who takes lessons and receives proofs of learning and reports.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

externalAuthId.description: Reference to an external authentication system's user ID for this student. (Security Best Practice: Passwords are not stored here).

phoneNumber.description: The phone number used by the student for IVR lessons and SMS notifications.

name.description: The full name of the student.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the student record was created.

Lesson.title: Lesson
Lesson.description: Represents a single educational lesson available through the IVR system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Lesson entity.

title.description: The title or name of the lesson.

description.description: A detailed description of the lesson content and objectives.

lessonContentUri.description: URI pointing to the digital content of the lesson (e.g., audio script, AI prompts).

aiEvaluationCriteria.description: Text or structured data outlining the criteria used by the AI to evaluate student responses for this lesson.

LessonAttempt.title: LessonAttempt
LessonAttempt.description: Records a student's specific attempt at completing a lesson, including their responses, evaluation, and grade.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LessonAttempt entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the Student who made this lesson attempt.

lessonId.description: Reference to the Lesson that was attempted.

lessonTitle.description: The title of the lesson at the time of the attempt.

subject.description: The educational subject of the lesson.

startTime.description: Timestamp indicating when the lesson attempt began.

endTime.description: Timestamp indicating when the lesson attempt concluded.

rawAudioUri.description: URI pointing to the raw audio recording of the student's responses.

transcribedText.description: The text transcription of the student's oral responses.

aiEvaluationResult.description: Structured JSON or text detailing the AI's assessment.

proofOfLearningId.description: Optional reference to the ProofOfLearning token.

ProofOfLearning.title: ProofOfLearning
ProofOfLearning.description: Represents an immutable Proof of Learning token minted on the blockchain.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProofOfLearning entity.

blockchainNetwork.description: The name of the blockchain network.

contractAddress.description: The address of the smart contract.

tokenId.description: The unique identifier of the token.

mintingDate.description: Timestamp when the token was successfully minted.

blockExplorerUrl.description: URL to view the token transaction.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudentReport entity.

generatedDate.description: Timestamp indicating when the report was generated.

reportContent.description: The textual or structured content of the report.

sentViaSms.description: Flag indicating if sent via SMS.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the student.

params.name: lessonId
params.description: The unique identifier of the lesson.

definition.description: Records a student's specific attempt at a lesson.
Stores private Proof of Learning tokens.
A public, read-only collection of all minted Proofs.

params.name: proofId
params.description: The unique identifier for this public proof record.

firestore.reasoning: Standard structure for secure, path-based ownership and public verification.
